events.title: RAVE CUP: World Cup Quarter Finals Watch Party + Rave
events.fullTitle: RAVE CUP: World Cup Quarter Finals Watch Party + Rave
events.description: One match. One city. One rave. As the FIFA World Cup reaches the Quarter Finals, Miami comes together for a one-of-a-kind experience that blends the energy of football with the pulse of underground dance music. Join us at Casa Nube Wynwood for an all-day celebration featuring live match screenings on a giant LED wall, food and drink specials, contests, giveaways, and a 3v3 mini soccer tournament. Then, as the final whistle blows, the venue transforms into a late-night rave featuring some of Miami's most exciting underground selectors and the long awaited debut of ARWEENN. Whether you're here for the football, the music, or the culture that connects them both, Rave Cup is where passion meets the dance floor. Music By Adelo Arweenn (USA Debut) Domnrob Franky De Rey Hunter Steel B2B Icky Event Schedule Doors Open 3PM Kickoff 5PM Rave Begins 9PM Until 3AM Experience Giant LED Match Viewing Live Commentary Food & Drink Specials 3v3 Mini Soccer Tournament Contests & Giveaways Watch Party + Rave Under One Roof Special Perks Wear your team's jersey and receive a free shot First 100 attendees receive a free ticket to a future Black Room event Stay for the rave and party until close Football. Music. Culture. Watch the game. Stay for the rave. GET YOUR TICKET NOW July 11th, 2026 CASA NUBE WYNWOOD Physical ID required | +18 No racism, sexism, homophobia, transphobia, or hate of any kind. All ticket sales are final. No refunds. Contact: info@blackroom.live or DM @blackroom.us
events.address: Casa Nube Wynwood 2060 NW 1st Ave, Miami, FL 33127, USA
